name: Agilent Technologies, Inc.
description: Agilent Technologies, Inc. is a global leader in life sciences, diagnostics, and applied chemical markets. The company provides application-focused solutions that include instruments, software, services, and consumables for the entire laboratory workflow. Agilent serves customers in life sciences, diagnostics, clinical medicine, environmental and forensics, pharmaceutical and biopharmaceutical, food, and chemical and energy markets, helping them gain the insights and clinical outcomes they seek.
